description_en: Standard status codes returned by all jobs: OKAY, BUSY, ERROR_ECU_REJECTED, ERROR_ECU_PARAMETER, ERROR_ECU_FUNCTION, ERROR_ECU_NUMBER, ERROR_ECU_NACK, ERROR_ECU_UNKNOWN_STATUSBYTE.
List of ECU hardware manufacturers and suppliers (Bosch, Siemens, Hella, Delphi, Valeo, MBB, etc.) referenced across all BMW modules.
Standard text strings for diagnostic progress and status reporting used across modules.
Text labels for colors and operational states used in diagnostic responses.
Defines all live data parameters readable from this ECU: byte position in DS2 telegram, data type, measurement unit, and scaling factors FACT_A / FACT_B.
Defines the byte layout of fault memory detail records stored in the ECU.
Defines the byte layout of info and status detail records stored in the ECU.
Defines the byte layout of historical fault records stored in the ECU.
Human-readable descriptions for fault environment (Umwelt) data fields captured alongside fault codes.
Human-readable descriptions for info environment data fields.
Maps diagnostic concepts and modes to their implementation parameters for this ECU.
Digital input and output control value definitions for actuator testing.
ASCII character mapping table used for string encoding within the ECU communication protocol.
Extended set of job status codes beyond the standard JOBRESULT set, used by newer ECU generations.
Matrix defining which environment data fields are captured for each fault code.
Human-readable text descriptions for diagnostic trouble codes (DTCs).
Text representations of ECU operational status values returned by status jobs.
Lookup table mapping color type codes to their text representations.
